audit_items.proof_trace: The priceMultiplier decays monotonically via `S - floor((S-E)*t/D)`: floor division on a positive product is non-decreasing in t, so the result is non-increasing. Both `mulWadUp` (auctionUsdValue) and `mulDivUp` (assetOutAmount) preserve monotonicity because ceiling is a monotone function on a non-increasing sequence — the output cannot increase as the input decreases. S >= E is enforced at config time by `StartingPriceMultiplierLowerThanEndingPriceMultiplier` validation, ruling out underflow.
